title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to pull, create, and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same generate/chat/embed APIs as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama’s REST API for easy chaining, memory, and tool use.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, and admin panel.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop GUI to browse, pull, and chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU node selectors and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & CUDA) with multi-arch support and compose examples.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, and embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API with ActiveModel-style interfaces and streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET Standard 2.0 client library for C# / F# with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir client with GenServer behaviour and LiveView hooks for real-time chat apps.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-go
summary: Go client generated from OpenAPI specs with context support and idiomatic error handling.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app adding Ollama chat and embed endpoints with admin UI and rate limiting.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service that proxies and extends Ollama with OpenAI-compatible chat completions and embeddings endpoints.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and moderation hooks.
